description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a sharply pointed nose and a glossy, dark-tinted canopy situated near the front. The wings are broad and sharply swept, extending outward with a slight downward angle and finished in a metallic blue color. The body is predominantly black with blue striping running longitudinally, giving it a futuristic appearance. At the rear, two prominent red circular jet exhausts are visible, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The underside of the wings and fuselage are flat, with no visible landing gear, and the overall design is compact and streamlined. The cockpit appears to be a single-seat, enclosed bubble integrated smoothly into the fuselage.
description: A futuristic, angular black and blue airplane with swept wings, a glossy bubble canopy, and twin rear jet exhausts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, glossy canopy, and angular swept wing with a flat underside.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, downward-angled wings, central canopy, and sharp nose.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wing and canopy profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin red jet exhausts and the broad, angular wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; features a tailless or blended wing-body configuration with no visible vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat, enclosed bubble canopy integrated into the fuselage.
